correct_position_distribution_note: 0-based index of the '=' line within each MCQ's answer block (q1-q12, in file order). Verified directly against artifacts/quiz.gift: counts {0: 3, 1: 3, 2: 3, 3: 3} — perfectly uniform across 12 MCQs.

option_length_balance.method: Character length of each answer option's learner-visible text (backslash escapes for : and = excluded, since they render invisibly in GIFT), measured per question; verified within +/-20% of that question's own mean.
option_length_balance.per_question_lengths_note: Listed in the answer-line order actually written in quiz.gift (post-shuffle), so index i corresponds to correct_position_distribution[i] for that question.
option_length_balance.longest_option_is_correct_note: Out of 12 MCQs, the correct answer is the longest (or tied-longest) option in 3 (q2 tie, q9, q10) -- 25%, matching chance level for 4 options and showing no systematic length-favors-correct bias.
